ICalculatedProperties Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ICalculatedProperties type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
CalculatedProperties
Returns the set of calculated properties that should be exposed to the client.
Modifiers
Returns the property modifiers indexed by column name.
